user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new training topic, so that employees can be trained on relevant subjects
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Training Topics screen; When I click Add new topic and provide topic, description, mode and duration; Then the topic is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view training topics with their description, mode, duration and number of trainers, so that I can manage the training catalog
acceptance_criteria: Given training topics exist; When I open the Training Topics screen; Then I see each topic's Topic, Description, Mode, Duration and Number of trainer(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing training topic, so that I can keep its details and assigned trainers up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given a topic is listed; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the training topics list, so that I can browse all topics when there are many records
acceptance_criteria: Given there are more topics than fit on one page; When I use the pagination controls; Then the next set of topics is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the training topics list, so that I see the most current topics
acceptance_criteria: Given topics have been added or edited; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step with Next, so that I can continue configuring learning management
acceptance_criteria: Given I have finished managing training topics; When I click Next; Then I move to the next configuration step
